title: How to calculate percentage change between two numbers
task: Work out the percent increase or decrease from an old value to a new value.

excel.note: Format the cell as Percent. B2=new, A2=old.

explanation: Percentage change is (new - old) / old. Going from 200 to 250 is (250-200)/200 = 0.25 = a 25% increase. A negative result means a decrease. Then format the cell as a percentage.
